parameters: Jeez you're tough, but I won't let you win.\.\^
This is why you don't betray us, Aneca!\.\^
Is this the great Isara? Hah, pathetic!\.\^
GabText Do want to enable the tutorial?
GabText Let's start with the basics.
GabText Select the 'attack' button and then select Lisnia.
GabText You did it! Well done!
GabText To use magic use the 'magic' button.
GabTextThen select the magic skill you wish to use.
GabText Select the magic you wish to use.
GabText You get more powerful spells as you level up.
GabText Now let's try some defence.
GabText You can temporarily increase your defence with guard.
GabText Just go on the menu and select it.
GabText Remember that guard takes up a whole turn.
GabText The user won't be able to harm the opponent or heal.
GabText Well, at least not until the next turn.
GabText Now let's talk about items.
GabText You don't have any items now so...
GabText There you go, you've got something.
GabText Now let's test it out, should we?
GabText Well, that's all you need to know for now, good luck!

we need to focus on defeating her.

\nr<Harbin>Don't tell me this is her second
\nr<Alayna>You are foolish, \n[1], you had no chance
of defeating me to begin with.
\n<Hailey>I'll be fine! I can handle it.
\n<Haiden>It hurts...I don't know how long I can
